subject: Procurement Card Program Review
body:
Finance Operations,

Annual review of our corporate procurement card (P-card) program:

Program Statistics (FY2025):
- Active cards: 45
- Total spend: $2.8M
- Average transaction: $340
- Number of transactions: 8,235
- Rebate earned: $28K (1% on all spend)

Policy Violations Detected:
- Split transactions to avoid approval limits: 12 instances
- Personal purchases: 3 instances ($1,240 total, all recovered)
- Missing receipts: 89 instances (down from 156 in FY2024)

Recommendations:
1. Increase single transaction limit from $2,500 to $5,000 for department heads (reduces approval bottleneck)
2. Implement real-time transaction alerts via mobile app
3. Reduce number of active cards from 45 to 30 (consolidate department cards)
4. Negotiate improved rebate rate (targeting 1.5% based on spend volume)

Estimated annual rebate at new rate: $42K

New card agreement needs to be signed by April 30th.
